name: Breakfast Dutch
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first three ingredients.
2. Add enough milk to make a soupy consistency, similar to scrambled eggs.
3. Pour enough oil into a cast iron skillet so that the batter will not stick (be generous). The batter will stick while baking.
4. Pour the batter into the skillet.
5. Bake on top of the stove, stirring and chopping as for scrambled eggs, until it looks like scrambled eggs and is baked through.
6. Serve immediately with butter and syrup.
